stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (All, except CSE, IT) B.E / B.Tech (CSE / IT)
date_of_joining: January 26 (leaves will be provided for examination)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship (for All profile) : INR 20,000 pm Salary after 6 months Internship will be as under : for Application Engineer and Associate Business Analyst : CTC 4 LPA for Software Engineer : CTC 4.25 LPA
package_salary.bond: 1.8 Year (Including 6 months training period) ₹ 60,000 (If exit on or before completion of 6 months training period) & ₹1, 50,000 (If exit on or before completion of 1 year post training period)
